name: Crispy Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken Breast halves (4 oz each, skinned and boned)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise and mustard; stir well.
2. In a shallow bowl, combine wheat germ and the remaining ingredients except chicken.
3. Brush each chicken breast with the mustard mixture, then dredge in the breadcrumb mixture.
4. Place chicken in a 10" x 6" x 2" baking dish coated with Pam.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
6. Uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes or until chicken is tender.
